# Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Kenya
Region: KE
Citation: Data Protection Act, 2019
Authority: Office of the Data Protection Commissioner
Source URL: https://www.odpc.go.ke/dpa-act/
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Kenya Data Protection Act, ODPC, data controller, data processor, data protection impact assessment, 肯尼亚

## Summary
Kenya's data protection law with controller and processor obligations, data subject rights, data protection impact assessment, cross-border transfer controls, and ODPC enforcement.

## Key compliance obligations
- Process personal data in accordance with data protection principles.
- Provide privacy information and support data subject rights.
- Use DPIA for high-risk processing.
- Control transfers outside Kenya and maintain safeguards.
